prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3076R Gen II** (bolt-on for the **T24A-FTS** 2.4L turbocharged inline-4) with a custom **Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate** and **GReddy Profec EVO 2** boost controller for 320hp at 22psi on **E85 fuel** (stock internals retained with **ARP head studs** and **JE 9.5:1 forged pistons** for reliability).

Full **HKS Hi-Power Exhaust System** with **3.5-inch titanium piping**, **Burns Stainless 4-2-1 headers**, and **MagnaFlow 10432 catalytic converters** (maintaining emissions compliance while reducing backpressure by 40%).

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (NX-specific valving), **SuperPro poly bushings (full kit)**, and **D2 Racing adjustable camber plates** for -3.5° front camber, paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston 380mm front brakes** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for track use.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (NX 350-specific, 30mm extended fenders) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** and **Varis Japan front lip**, painted in **PPG Lexus Structural Blue** with **3M Matte Black wrap accents**.

**Seibon Carbon Fiber hood** (OEM-style replacement, 30% weight reduction) with **custom heat extractor vents** and **LED DRL delete** for a cleaner look, paired with **Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x10.5 +35 rear)** in **Gunmetal Finish**.

**Interior full Alcantara retrim** by **Status Auto** (seats, door cards, headliner) in **Black Alcantara with red stitching**, featuring **Sparco Pro 2000 seats**, **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel**, and **AEM X-Series digital dash** replacing the stock cluster.
